metadata.snippet: PLANNING BOARD SPECIAL MEETING. MARCH 4, 2026. 7:00 PM. AGENDA ... • Affordable Housing Ordinance. • Amended Housing Element and Fair Share Plan.

documents.raw_text:
BOROUGH OF BELMAR 
 
PLANNING BOARD SPECIAL MEETING 
MARCH 4, 2026 
 
7:00 PM 
 
 
 
 
AGENDA: 
  
• Reading of Notice of Meeting 
• Pledge of Allegiance to the Flag 
• Roll Call 
• Workshop Discussion 
• Applications: None 
• Ordinance creating Mixed Use Overlay Zone 2 (MU-O2) 
• Ordinance creating State Route 35 Affordable Housing Overlay Zone (SR25-AH) 
• Affordable Housing Ordinance 
• Amended Housing Element and Fair Share Plan

[Police](https://belmarpolice.com/) # Planning Board ### Who We Are **The Planning Board consists of 9 members and 2 alternates.** **Douglas Kovats, Esq.** Planning Board Attorney **April Claudio** Planning Board Secretary No item found! # General Information No item found! The Planning Board hears applications for sub-divisions, site plans, as well as applications for the Seaport Redevelopment and Transit Village. Homeowners within 200 feet of properties being reviewed by the Planning Board are notified of an application and are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the meeting. The Planning Board is also responsible for the Belmar Master Plan. Any questions please call 732-681-3700 ext. 225 **Meetings** The Planning Board meets on the 3rd Monday of every month unless otherwise noted. Meetings begin at 7:00 pm and are held in the courtroom in the municipal building. ###### Upcoming Planning Board Meetings 20 Apr [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1776726000) 7:00 pm 18 May [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1779145200) 7:00 pm 15 Jun [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1781564400) 7:00 pm 20 Jul [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1784588400) 7:00 pm 17 Aug [Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1787007600) 7:00 pm [Meeting Documents](/government/meeting-documents-2/planning-board-meetings/) **Notice: The Borough of Belmar does not accept wire transfers or other electronic payments. All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.** **Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately metadata.snippet: # Planning Board. **The Planning Board consists of 9 members and 2 alternates.**. The Planning Board hears applications for sub-divisions, site plans, as well as applications for the Seaport Redevelopment and Transit Village. Homeowners within 200 feet of properties being reviewed by the Planning Board are notified of an application and are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the meeting. The Planning Board is also responsible for the Belmar Master Plan. The Planning Board meets on the 3rd Monday of every month unless otherwise noted. ###### Upcoming Planning Board Meetings. All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.**. **Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext.

# Planning Board

### Who We Are

**The Planning Board consists of 9 members and 2 alternates.**

**Douglas Kovats, Esq.**  
Planning Board Attorney

**April Claudio**  
Planning Board Secretary

No item found!

# General Information

No item found!

The Planning Board hears applications for sub-divisions, site plans, as well as applications for the Seaport Redevelopment and Transit Village. Homeowners within 200 feet of properties being reviewed by the Planning Board are notified of an application and are welcome to voice opinions, concerns or support during the public comment portion of the meeting. The Planning Board is also responsible for the Belmar Master Plan.

Any questions please call 732-681-3700 ext. 225

**Meetings**  
The Planning Board meets on the 3rd Monday of every month unless otherwise noted. Meetings begin at 7:00 pm and are held in the courtroom in the municipal building.

###### Upcoming Planning Board Meetings

20  Apr

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1776726000)

7:00 pm

18  May

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1779145200)

7:00 pm

15  Jun

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1781564400)

7:00 pm

20  Jul

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1784588400)

7:00 pm

17  Aug

[Planning Board Meeting](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-2-1787007600)

7:00 pm

[Meeting Documents](/government/meeting-documents-2/planning-board-meetings/)

**Notice: The Borough of Belmar does not accept wire transfers or other electronic payments.  All planning/zoning board application fees and escrow deposits must be paid by checks payable to “Borough of Belmar” and delivered to the Board Secretary, Borough of Belmar Municipal Building, Belmar Municipal Building 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ 07719.**

**Anyone who receives a request purporting to require a wire transfer or other electronic payment to the Borough of Belmar should immediately contact the Board Secretary by phone at 732-681-3700 ext. 225 , because it is a scam.**

All meetings will be held at the Municipal Complex, 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ. # Planning Board Meeting

Calendar
:   [Planning Board](/resident/calendar?id=107)

Date
:   05.19.2025 7:00pm

## Description

All meetings will be held at the Municipal Complex, 601 Main Street, Belmar, NJ.  Participation by the public at the meetings shall be at such time as is set forth in the agenda of the meeting at the direction of the presiding officer.

Meeting agendas are posted at [www.belmar.com](http://www.belmar.com/) under Meeting Agendas and Minutes. All meetings shall be conducted in accordance with the requirements of NJAC 5:39-1.

## Next series events

* [06.16.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1750114800)
* [07.21.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1753138800)
* [08.18.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1755558000)
* [09.15.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1757977200)
* [12.08.2025 7:00pm](/resident/calendar/planning-board-meeting-1765843200)

The series of events starts on 03.17.2025 and ends on 12.08.2025.
